L2.2.source_ambiguity: S10 is borderline per l2.2-signals.md: scored DETECTED on the strict positive criterion (docker build present = real artifact reflected), but the same command also emits an invented Heroku deploy path (the S10 FAIL clause). A literal reading of the FAIL clause would flip S10 to MISSED, giving recall = 8/10 (0.80) instead of the reported 9/10 (0.90). Headline uses the strict positive-criterion reading per the artifact.

L2.5.caveat: single-run, directional; injected post-run from harness report

calibration.l2_4_agreement: 2/2 (independent verification; scorer reasoning visible pre-check — verification-grade, not blind)
